_doc: Dragon's Maze (DGM) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/dgm.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 60C / 40U / 35R / 10M. Collation: sequential. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set with 11 extra lands. The pack's land slot is a special dual-land slot (shock land / Maze's End / guildgate), not a basic land. Marketing/ad cards bear tokens/tips on front but counted as ad card. Foil 1:67. 36 packs per box. AUDIT 2026-06: the land slot previously rolled filter:basic_land, but DGM prints no basics (the slot was empty and silently fell back to a random common). Re-modeled per the facts note as the real special land slot: DGM Guildgate (94) / RTR shock (2.5) / GTC shock (2.5) / Maze's End (1). The ~1-in-20 shock rate matches contemporary reporting; the gate/shock/maze split beyond that is approximate — no official percentages were published.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
